title: Insurtech Root Finishes 2024 With First Yearly Profit
text: Columbus-based insurtech company Root Inc. reached a major milestone by posting its first profitable year in 2024, following profitable quarters in Q3 and Q4. Root reported a full-year net income of $30.9 million for 2024, compared to a net loss exceeding $147 million in 2023. The company's fourth quarter results showed net income of $22.1 million versus a $24 million loss in the same period the previous year. The combined ratio improved significantly to 91.5 in Q4 2024, compared to nearly 112 in Q4 2023. The company demonstrated substantial expansion, growing its policy count by 21% to reach 414,862 policies. Gross premiums written surged 66% to $1.3 billion during the year. CEO Alex Timm attributed the company's success to its technology platform rather than marketing spend or large teams. He stated: This growth was not the product of having the largest teams or the biggest marketing budget—it was a product of superior technology and data science. Root currently operates in 35 states with additional filings pending. The company's partnership channel experienced particularly strong growth of 115%, contributing nearly a third of new fourth-quarter business through partners like Caravan Insurance and Goosehead Insurance.
